Brand.name: Nibble
Brand.tagline: Snap the plate. Know if they got enough.

Landing.heroTitle: Snap the plate. Know if they got enough.
Landing.heroSub: Nibble analyzes your baby's meals with AI and shows exactly how much iron, zinc, calcium, and DHA they're getting — plus answers every first-time-parent question you have.
Landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
Landing.pain1Desc: Your pediatrician didn't have time to say what to actually offer.
Landing.pain2Desc: You added red meat and egg yolk — but is it really enough?
Landing.pain3Title: Why is his poop that color?
Landing.pain3Desc: Green, yellow, black... you Google it every time.
Landing.pain4Desc: When to introduce peanuts, eggs, shellfish — you're guessing.
Landing.how1Desc: One photo. No weighing, no typing.
Landing.how2Desc: Iron, zinc, calcium, DHA — today's progress in 3 seconds.
Landing.how3Desc: Solids, allergens, poop, milestones — Nibble is ready.
Landing.finalCtaDesc: Free for 7 days. Cancel anytime, no questions asked.

Disclaimer.footer: Educational use only. Not medical advice. Always consult your pediatrician.
Disclaimer.aiResponse: This is educational information only, not medical advice. Please contact your pediatrician with any concerns.

Onboarding.welcomeSub: Tell us a bit about your baby so we can tailor nutrition targets by age.
Onboarding.step1Sub: A nickname is fine — no last name needed.
Onboarding.sexHint: Used for WHO growth-curve plotting only.
Onboarding.step2Sub: We calculate age from DOB and tailor nutrition guidance to the right bucket.
Onboarding.dobUnsupported: Nibble is tuned for ages 6 months to 4 years. We'll still log your baby's data, but some features may not apply.
Onboarding.step3Title: How are you feeding right now?
Onboarding.step3Sub: There's no wrong answer — you can change this anytime.
Onboarding.feedingBlwDesc: Offer foods baby picks up themselves to build chewing + coordination.
Onboarding.feedingPureeDesc: Smooth, spoon-fed textures, gradually thickening up.
Onboarding.feedingMixedDesc: Some purée plus finger foods, day by day.
Onboarding.step4Sub: Foods a pediatrician confirmed — or ones you suspect. Skip if none.
Onboarding.step5Sub: Nibble is an educational tool, not a medical service. Please confirm you understand before we start.
Onboarding.consentItem1: Nibble's feeding suggestions are for educational reference only, not medical advice.
Onboarding.consentItem2: For any health concern I will consult a pediatrician or qualified provider.
Onboarding.consentItem3: All decisions are mine — Nibble just helps me keep notes organized.
Onboarding.consentCheckbox: I understand and agree with the above

Scan.title: Snap your baby's plate
Scan.sub: Get the whole plate in frame — Nibble identifies every food and its nutrients.
Scan.noChildWarning: Create a baby profile first so we can match age-appropriate targets.
Scan.nutrientsHint: Targets are for the whole day — this meal is one contribution.
Scan.allergenWarningBody: This plate may contain the following flagged allergens: {allergens}. Please double-check before feeding.
Scan.faceDetectedError: The photo contains a face and we don't analyze those — please photograph just the plate.
Scan.noFoodsError: We couldn't identify any food. Try better lighting and include the whole plate.
Scan.disclaimer: Nutrient estimates use WHO/AAP averages — individual babies may differ.

Poop.title: Log a diaper
Poop.sub: Pick the closest shape + color. This helps spot patterns — it's not a diagnosis.
Poop.notesPlaceholder: Unusual smell, straining, new food trial…
Poop.redFlagHint: Black, red, or white stools, or persistent watery stools, can signal something your pediatrician should see.
Poop.emptyHistory: No entries yet. Log the first one to start tracking patterns.
Poop.noChildWarning: Create a baby profile first so we can link the log.
